initial_candidates.sql:
WITH all_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        ss_quantity AS quantity,
        ss_list_price AS list_price,
        i_brand_id
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        'catalog' AS channel,
        cs_quantity AS quantity,
        cs_list_price AS list_price,
        i_brand_id
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        'web' AS channel,
        ws_quantity AS quantity,
        ws_list_price AS list_price,
        i_brand_id
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
)
SELECT 
    channel,
    i_brand_id,
    SUM(quantity * list_price) AS total_sales
FROM all_sales
GROUP BY channel, i_brand_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

WITH sales_by_channel AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
        ss_quantity AS quantity,
        ss_list_price AS list_price
    FROM store_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'catalog' AS channel,
        cs_item_sk AS item_sk,
        cs_quantity AS quantity,
        cs_list_price AS list_price
    FROM catalog_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'web' AS channel,
        ws_item_sk AS item_sk,
        ws_quantity AS quantity,
        ws_list_price AS list_price
    FROM web_sales
),
sales_with_brand AS (
    SELECT 
        s.channel,
        i.i_brand_id,
        s.quantity * s.list_price AS sales_amount
    FROM sales_by_channel s
    JOIN item i ON s.item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON d.d_date_sk = (
        CASE 
            WHEN s.channel = 'store' THEN (SELECT ss_sold_date_sk FROM store_sales WHERE ss_item_sk = s.item_sk LIMIT 1)
            WHEN s.channel = 'catalog' THEN (SELECT cs_sold_date_sk FROM catalog_sales WHERE cs_item_sk = s.item_sk LIMIT 1)
            WHEN s.channel = 'web' THEN (SELECT ws_sold_date_sk FROM web_sales WHERE ws_item_sk = s.item_sk LIMIT 1)
        END
    )
    WHERE d.d_year = 2000 AND d.d_moy = 2
)
SELECT 
    channel,
    i_brand_id,
    SUM(sales_amount) AS total_sales
FROM sales_with_brand
GROUP BY channel, i_brand_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100

WITH all_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        ss_quantity * ss_list_price AS sales_amount,
        item.i_brand_id
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'catalog' AS channel,
        cs_quantity * cs_list_price AS sales_amount,
        item.i_brand_id
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        'web' AS channel,
        ws_quantity * ws_list_price AS sales_amount,
        item.i_brand_id
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000 AND date_dim.d_moy = 2
)
SELECT 
    channel,
    i_brand_id,
    SUM(sales_amount) AS total_sales
FROM all_sales
GROUP BY channel, i_brand_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

WITH all_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
        ss_quantity AS quantity,
        ss_list_price AS list_price
    FROM store_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'catalog' AS channel,
        cs_item_sk AS item_sk,
        cs_quantity AS quantity,
        cs_list_price AS list_price
    FROM catalog_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'web' AS channel,
        ws_item_sk AS item_sk,
        ws_quantity AS quantity,
        ws_list_price AS list_price
    FROM web_sales
)
SELECT 
    channel,
    i_brand_id,
    SUM(quantity * list_price) AS total_sales
FROM all_sales
JOIN item ON all_sales.item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON 
    (channel = 'store' AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk) OR
    (channel = 'catalog' AND cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk) OR
    (channel = 'web' AND ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk)
WHERE d_year = 2000 AND d_moy = 2
GROUP BY channel, i_brand_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
